component.name: Fan Control
component.summary: Per-fan PID control for Linux desktop systems

description.p: KDE Fan Control provides flexible, per-fan PID control for Linux desktop machines where the standard fancontrol utility is too rigid or cumbersome. It runs a privileged daemon that manages fan speeds using selectable temperature inputs or aggregated sensor groups, and exposes control through DBus to a KDE/Qt6 GUI, system tray app, and CLI.

ul.li: Per-fan PID control with configurable gains, limits, and sample intervals
Automatic hardware discovery via Linux hwmon sysfs interface
KDE-native GUI with overview, inventory, and fan detail pages
System tray integration with status notifications
Staged draft/applied configuration lifecycle with validation
Auto-tune wizard for suggesting PID gains
Fail-safe fallback: fans driven to maximum speed on daemon failure
Friendly name persistence for sensors and fans

description.p: Initial release. All v1 requirements validated across 4 phases.
